name: Detective Kenji
appearance: Detective Kenji stands tall with a rugged, weathered face, short black hair, and a sharp jawline, wearing a long, black trench coat with a neon-blue glow of his cyberdeck visible under the collar, set against the backdrop of a rainy, dystopian Neo-Tokyo streetscape.

name: Informant Zara
appearance: Informant Zara has a petite yet athletic build, with short, spiky hair dyed in vibrant, electric blue, and piercing green eyes, wearing a sleek black jumpsuit with built-in flexi-armor, set against the dark, rainy alleyways of Neo-Tokyo.

name: Ada
appearance: Ada is a holographic AI assistant with a slender, androgynous appearance, short silver hair, and an ethereal glow surrounding her body, wearing a minimalist white jumpsuit with intricate circuit patterns, set against the backdrop of a high-tech laboratory.

name: CEO Ryota Nakamura
appearance: CEO Ryota Nakamura is a tall, imposing figure with a chiseled, angular face, slicked-back black hair, and piercing brown eyes, wearing an expensive, tailored black suit with a crisp white shirt and a black tie, set against the sleek, modern backdrop of his high-rise office.
